prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: 1024x1024 marketplace plugin icon
Primary request: Create a premium minimal bitmap icon for a cross-agent merge-request review response workflow that safely tracks discussion threads, exact commit provenance, and verified handoff.
Subject: two bold interlocking review-thread shapes orbiting one centered immutable commit checkpoint, with a small integrated check path; the silhouette should suggest conversation plus exact-head verification, not a generic chat app.
Style/medium: polished modern app icon, vector-friendly but rendered as a high-quality bitmap, flat geometric foreground with subtle dimensional polish.
Composition/framing: centered, one dominant readable silhouette, generous safe area, no small details, readable at 32x32.
Scene/backdrop: full-bleed rounded-square app-icon background built around deep indigo #29235C with a restrained midnight-to-violet gradient.
Color palette: high-contrast warm coral and pale mint foreground shapes that meet WCAG non-text contrast against the indigo background.
Materials/textures: crisp solid shapes, subtle soft highlights, no busy texture, no photo material, no UI screenshot.
Text (verbatim): none.
Constraints: no visible letters, words, numbers, code, brand logos, fox imagery, mascots, tiny badges, tiny decorative dots, thin-line illustration, product UI, watermark, or private names.
Avoid: GitLab logo or trademark imitation, GitHub mark, generic speech-bubble-only logo, object collage, complex scene, skeuomorphic clutter, low contrast, text inside the icon.
checks: save the selected image into the plugin workspace as assets/icon.png
inspect the image at 1024, 64, and 32 px
reject visible text, letters, tiny details, screenshots, photos, watermarks, brand marks, or low contrast
wire interface.composerIcon, interface.logo, and interface.brandColor after the file exists
